rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal limits and has no relation to Educ. Code §37.307, which governs placement and review of students with disabilities receiving special education services.
quote: Sec. 37.307. PLACEMENT AND REVIEW OF STUDENT WITH DISABILITY.
_note: No overlap between proposed property-tax change and this education-code provision on special education placement.
